article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.2. Attachment 3 - REZ 25-11 - Rezoning Prerequisites 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Rezoning at 5035 Beresford Street — Council to Consider Approval Conditions
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to consider a list of conditions that a developer must meet before a rezoning bylaw for 5035 Beresford Street can be finalized. These prerequisites include engineering upgrades, road dedications, legal agreements, and affordable housing requirements.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council vote — this rezoning could affect nearby property values and street access.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Transportation & Logistics
